inputs.label: Time Low
inputs.businessContext: Least significant 32 bits of the timestamp (100-nanosecond intervals since UUID epoch)

businessContext_i18n.en: Least significant 32 bits of the timestamp (100-nanosecond intervals since UUID epoch)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman damgasının en az anlamlı 32 biti (UUID döneminden bu yana 100 nanosaniyelik aralıklar)
businessContext_i18n.de: Niederwertigste 32 Bits des Zeitstempels (100-Nanosekunden-Intervalle seit UUID-Epoche)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 32 bits les moins significatifs du timestamp (intervalles de 100 nanosecondes depuis l'époque UUID)
businessContext_i18n.es: 32 bits menos significativos de la marca de tiempo (intervalos de 100 nanosegundos desde la época UUID)
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقل 32 بت أهمية من الطابع الزمني (فواصل زمنية 100 نانوثانية منذ عصر UUID)

businessContext_i18n.es: 16 bits intermedios de la marca de tiempo

inputs.label: Time High & Version
inputs.businessContext: 12 bits time high (most significant) + 4 bits UUID version (0001 for v1)

businessContext_i18n.en: 12 bits time high (most significant) + 4 bits UUID version (0001 for v1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 12 bit zaman yüksek (en anlamlı) + 4 bit UUID sürümü (v1 için 0001)
businessContext_i18n.de: 12 Bits Zeit hoch (höchstwertig) + 4 Bits UUID-Version (0001 für v1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 12 bits temps haut (les plus significatifs) + 4 bits version UUID (0001 pour v1)
businessContext_i18n.es: 12 bits de tiempo alto (más significativos) + 4 bits de versión UUID (0001 para v1)
businessContext_i18n.ar: 12 بت وقت عالي (الأكثر أهمية) + 4 بت إصدار UUID (0001 للإصدار v1)

inputs.label: Clock Sequence & Variant
inputs.businessContext: 14-bit clock sequence + 2-bit variant (10 for standard DCE)

businessContext_i18n.en: 14-bit clock sequence + 2-bit variant (10 for standard DCE)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 14 bit saat dizisi + 2 bit varyant (standart DCE için 10)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 14 bits de séquence d'horloge + 2 bits de variante (10 pour DCE standard)
businessContext_i18n.es: Secuencia de reloj de 14 bits + variante de 2 bits (10 para DCE estándar)
businessContext_i18n.ar: تسلسل ساعة 14 بت + متغير 2 بت (10 لـ DCE القياسي)

inputs.label: Node (MAC)
inputs.businessContext: 48-bit node identifier, typically the MAC address

businessContext_i18n.en: 48-bit node identifier, typically the MAC address
businessContext_i18n.tr: 48 bit düğüm tanımlayıcısı, tipik olarak MAC adresi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Identifiant de nœud sur 48 bits, généralement l'adresse MAC
businessContext_i18n.es: Identificador de nodo de 48 bits, normalmente la dirección MAC
businessContext_i18n.ar: معرّف العقدة 48 بت، عادةً عنوان MAC
